summary: Excellent front‑of‑house soundboard capture of a smoking first set.
review: The fix applied to this front‑of‑house recording makes the audio crystal clear, earning a perfect five‑star rating for its sound quality. Reviewers also rave about the first set, calling it a smoker and highlighting the strong performance throughout.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review but it gives a perfect rating for both recording and show, indicating an outstanding performance and high‑quality audio.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Fix applied improves clarity; reviewers describe the recording as great with no noted issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set praised as a smoker, suggesting high energy and tight playing throughout.
